seasonArc: Chiara Consonni was Canyon//SRAM zondacrypto's salvage act at Milano-Sanremo Donne in 2026. With team leader Kasia Niewiadoma crashing out on the Cipressa descent, the Italian sprinter kept the squad in the result, taking tenth out of the chasing bunch at +0:09 on home roads. A top-ten on a day her team's main card was undone by misfortune, and a marker of her reliable sprint speed in the spring classics.
